assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: business owners and marketers spending on Meta ads without a clear evidence-backed diagnosis

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Advertisers can see many warnings and recommendations without knowing which issue is most material.
creative_strategy.message_angle: The audit organizes evidence into a prioritized action sequence.
creative_strategy.hook: Not every signal deserves the same priority.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A physical triage table will communicate prioritization more credibly than a generic analytics dashboard.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a strategy table holding varied abstract campaign signals sorted into now, next, and monitor zones
visual_direction.action: a precise lime rail moves the most material evidence into the first action zone
visual_direction.environment: a dark expert workshop with paper, glass, and metal evidence objects
visual_direction.composition: three zones run diagonally across lower two-thirds, headline field above-left
visual_direction.lighting: focused task lighting with lime priority rail and restrained cyan evidence edges
visual_direction.style: premium consulting editorial still life with operational clarity

copy.overlay_headline: Not every signal deserves the same priority.
copy.caption: A full Meta Ads audit separates observations from priorities and turns account evidence into a practical 30-day action plan.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a strategy table holding varied abstract campaign signals sorted into now, next, and monitor zones. Show a precise lime rail moves the most material evidence into the first action zone. Set the scene in a dark expert workshop with paper, glass, and metal evidence objects. Composition: three zones run diagonally across lower two-thirds, headline field above-left. Lighting: focused task lighting with lime priority rail and restrained cyan evidence edges. Visual style: premium consulting editorial still life with operational clarity. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'The audit organizes evidence into a prioritized action sequence.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Not every signal deserves the same priority.', support line '$175 Full Meta Ads Audit', and CTA 'Get the 30-day action plan' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid hospital triage, red emergency alarms, recommendation badges, or fabricated severity scores, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
hospital triage, red emergency alarms, recommendation badges, or fabricated severity scores

accessibility.alt_text: Campaign signals are sorted into now, next, and monitor zones on a strategy table.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $175 price and full-audit scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
